item.title: Selfie Ring Light Tripod
item.description: A monopod, also called a unipod, is a single staff or pole used to help support cameras, binoculars, rifles or other precision instruments in the field.

item.title: Marketing
item.description: Marketing is the act of acquiring, satisfying and retaining customers. It is one of the primary components of business management and commerce.
